task_a.description: Test cases for Task A — User Modeling. POST to /generate-review

tests.label: Strong Nigerian persona — food
tests.notes: Core test. Expect Pidgin in review, rating 3.5-4.5, nigerian_context_applied: true

input.persona: Lagos food blogger in her 30s, grew up in Surulere, very price conscious, writes in a mix of English and Pidgin, rates generously but complains loudly about portion size and value for money
input.product: Peppered snail and fried plantain combo at a bukka in Yaba, Lagos. Costs ₦2,500

tests.label: Nigerian professional — tech product
tests.notes: Expect long detailed review, rating 2.5-4.0, formal tone, mentions alternatives

input.persona: Abuja-based software engineer, 27, analytical reviewer, writes long detailed reviews, rarely gives 5 stars, always mentions alternatives, follows tech Twitter
input.product: Infinix Hot 40 Pro smartphone, bought from Slot Nigeria for ₦189,000

tests.label: Blunt low-rater
tests.notes: Expect short review, rating 1.0-2.5, formal English, low confidence_cap applied

input.persona: Retired civil servant in Port Harcourt, very hard to impress, short reviews, rates mostly 1 to 2 stars, writes in formal English, compares everything to how things were in the 80s
input.product: Fried rice and chicken at a fast food restaurant in GRA Port Harcourt, ₦4,800

tests.label: Cold-start — minimal persona
tests.notes: Tests fallback to population priors. Should still return valid review with reasonable rating

tests.label: Cross-domain — fashion product
tests.notes: Non-food item. Expect emoji-style tone, high rating, brand references

input.persona: Fashion-forward university student in Lagos Island, shops online frequently, writes emoji-heavy reviews, very brand conscious, rates 4 to 5 stars mostly
input.product: Ankara midi dress ordered from Jiji Nigeria, delivered in 3 days, ₦12,000

tests.label: Edge case — very unhappy user
tests.notes: Expect low rating 1.0-2.0, long complaint-heavy review, confidence_cap should fire if pct_5star high

input.persona: Frequent Yelp reviewer, extremely detail-oriented, has left over 200 reviews, never gives 5 stars on principle, writes 3 to 4 paragraph reviews, Lagos mainland resident
input.product: Cold jollof rice served 45 minutes late at a restaurant in Ikeja that charged ₦6,500 for the meal

task_b.description: Test cases for Task B — Recommendation. POST to /recommend

tests.label: Standard — Movies with niche
tests.notes: Core flow test. Expect 5 ranked movies, Nigerian/African titles favoured, fallback_used: false

input.persona: Lagos professional, late 20s, watches Nollywood and Hollywood action films, rates thrillers highly, hasn't explored sci-fi or documentaries, watches on Netflix

tests.label: Cold-start — minimal persona, no niche
tests.notes: Tests cold-start handling. Should still return 5 recommendations using population priors

input.persona: Nigerian user who likes watching films

tests.label: Cross-domain — same persona, different domain
tests.notes: Same persona as TB-01 but Books domain. Recommendations should feel connected to thriller affinity

input.persona: Lagos professional, late 20s, watches Nollywood and Hollywood action films, rates thrillers highly, hasn't explored sci-fi or documentaries, watches on Netflix

tests.label: Food with niche
tests.notes: Domain switching test. Expect locally relevant food picks with ₦ price awareness

input.persona: Abuja food lover, mid 30s, prefers local Nigerian cuisine over continental, very price sensitive, visits restaurants mostly on weekends, has tried suya spots across Abuja

tests.label: Music — Other domain path
tests.notes: Tests Other domain handling. Expect Afrobeats/Amapiano picks, fallback_used: false

input.persona: University student in Ibadan, loves Afrobeats and Amapiano, follows Burna Boy and Asake closely, discovers music on TikTok, creates study playlists

tests.label: Fallback trigger — unrecognised domain
tests.notes: Must return fallback_used: true and general lifestyle recommendations. Critical for graceful degradation score

input.persona: Lagos entrepreneur, early 30s, reads business content, watches motivational content, very goal oriented

tests.label: Skincare — Other domain with niche
tests.notes: Tests niche narrowing on a non-preset domain. Expect locally available Nigerian products

input.persona: Young Nigerian woman in Lagos, mid 20s, very conscious about skin health, follows skincare creators on Instagram, prefers affordable products available locally, has oily skin
input.niche: affordable Nigerian-made products for oily skin

tests.label: Cross-domain cold-start — hardest case
tests.notes: Minimal persona + unfamiliar domain. Tests agent's ability to reason with almost no signal. Should not crash.

notes: Run high priority tests first. TB-06 (fallback) and TB-08 (cold-start) are likely judge test cases. TA-04 and TB-02 test cold-start handling which is worth 25pts in Task B scoring.
